question: Is the image a realistic photograph with soft diffused lighting?
Is there exactly 1 light wood-toned seedling work table centered in the frame?
Does the tabletop feature moist water stains of varying depth?
Is there exactly 1 black plastic seedling tray positioned on the left side of the work table?
Are there exactly 6 seedlings arranged in neat rows inside the black tray?
Do the seedlings in the tray have purple leaves and slightly varying heights?
Are there exactly 5 small black flower pots lined up in a row to the right of the seedling tray?
Is the 1st pot (leftmost) in the row empty?
Does the 2nd pot contain light brown peat soil?
Does the 3rd pot contain exactly 1 tender green small seedling?
Does the 4th pot contain white perlite granules?
Does the 5th pot contain exactly 1 thin-leaved small grass?
Do all 5 pots face upward with visible soil stains on their rims?
Is there exactly 1 bag of dark potting soil located below the table on the left side?
Is the mouth of the potting soil bag open and folded outward?
Is there exactly 1 watering can made of transparent glass in the lower left of the frame?
Does the watering can have a slim elongated spout pointing toward the right?
Is there a visible water level line inside the glass watering can?
Are there exactly 2 spray bottles standing upright to the right of the watering can?
Does the left spray bottle have an orange body with a white spray head?
Does the right spray bottle have a transparent body with a black spray head and contain gold glitter suspension liquid?
Is there exactly 1 pair of red-handled pruning shears lying flat on the front edge of the work table?
Are the shears' metal blades closed with the tip pointing to the right?
Are there exactly 2 green gardening gloves stacked together beside the shears?
Do the gloves' fingers point toward the left with visible rubber grip dots on the fabric?
Is there exactly 1 roll of off-white hemp rope on a spool at the right front corner of the work table?
Does the loose end of the hemp rope hang down to the edge of the tabletop?
Are there exactly 7 plant label tags arranged in a fan shape behind the spool?
Are the plant label tags made of rainbow holographic material and completely blank?
Are there exactly 2 small terracotta pots in the center of the work table?
Does the left terracotta pot contain a succulent with thick leaves in a radial pattern?
Does the right terracotta pot contain a succulent with bright blue leaves and pointier tips?
Is there exactly 1 white hanging pot in the upper right area of the frame?
Does a trailing vine plant cascade down from the hanging pot, forming an arc above the work table?
Is there exactly 1 gray water bucket located below the work table on the right side?
Is the bucket half full with the water surface reflecting light?
Is there exactly 1 wooden box beside the water bucket containing exactly 7 light brown bulbs?
Do the bulbs vary in size and feature dry papery skin?
